Uses of Class
org.docgene.model.globals.ArticlesModel

  • Packages that use ArticlesModel 
    Package Description
    org.docgene.api
    This package allows to generate a wiki in another application, using the docGenerator API.
    org.docgene.main
    Contains the entry point of the application.
    org.docgene.model
    Contains the documentation model.
    org.docgene.model.globals
    Contains the global elements for the wiki model.

    • Uses of ArticlesModel in org.docgene.api

      Methods in org.docgene.api that return ArticlesModel 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ArticlesModel DocGeneratorAPI.createModel()
      Creates the model.
      ArticlesModel DocGeneratorAPI.getModel()
      Return the model.

    • Uses of ArticlesModel in org.docgene.main

      Methods in org.docgene.main that return ArticlesModel 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ArticlesModel Configuration.getArticlesModel()
      Return the articles model.
      Methods in org.docgene.main with parameters of type ArticlesModel 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void Configuration.setArticlesModel(ArticlesModel model)
      Set the articles model.

    • Uses of ArticlesModel in org.docgene.model

      Methods in org.docgene.model with parameters of type ArticlesModel 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      XMLTableRow XMLTable.getFirstRow(ArticlesModel model)
      Return the first row.
      java.util.List<ListElement> XMLList.getItems(ArticlesModel model)
      Return the list elements in the list.
      java.util.List<XMLTreeItem> XMLTree.getItems(ArticlesModel model)
      Return the tree elements in the list.
      java.util.List<XMLTableRow> XMLTable.getRows(ArticlesModel model)
      Return the rows in the table.
